title: ac_recorded event payload
$comment: Class: REQUIRES_SPEC_ID. Records evidence for a single acceptance criterion. Replaces the legacy verify-acs scattered writes.

evidence_ref.description: Reference to the evidence: test command, test_nodeid, artifact path, or waiver id.

test_nodeid.description: Specific test node id (jest/vitest/pytest) when status was determined by test execution.

command.description: The command that was run to determine status.
